vuejs.commander.enable.description: Enable or disable the VueJS Commander extension

vuejs.commander.packages.defaultPackageM.description: Default package manager to use when creating a new project

vuejs.commander.terminal.currentWorkingD.description: Optional absolute path override for the terminal working directory. When unset, commands run in the selected workspace folder.

vuejs.commander.terminal.hideFromUser.description: Hide the terminal from the user
